example: decoder model weights or adapter weights
reuse_mode: shared across requests, agents, and batches
placement_candidates: HBM/GPU memory; CPU DRAM; pooled memory; NVMe cold tier
eviction_failure_mode: cold-start latency, capacity loss, or forced rerouting

size_driver: layers x heads x head_dim x tokens x precision
lifetime_end: request/session ends, context is summarized, or branch is discarded
reuse_distance_driver: turn count, context length, branch survival, decode horizon
placement_candidates: HBM/GPU memory; CPU DRAM offload; pooled memory
compression_candidates: lower precision; paging; summarization boundary; eviction by segment
eviction_failure_mode: recompute prefill, lose latency target, or truncate context

example: system prompt, tool schema, common task prefix
size_driver: prefix token length and number of reusable variants
lifetime_end: template changes, model changes, or cache invalidation
reuse_mode: exact prefix reuse across sessions or branches
placement_candidates: HBM/GPU memory; CPU DRAM; shared cache service
compression_candidates: deduplication; hash indexing; lower precision KV
eviction_failure_mode: lost cache hit and repeated prefill

example: RAG document chunks or source excerpts
size_driver: chunk count x chunk token length
lifetime_end: request ends, corpus version invalidates, or project no longer needs it
reuse_mode: reuse by query locality, corpus popularity, or project locality
reuse_distance_driver: query repetition, corpus skew, and source stability
placement_candidates: CPU DRAM; NVMe; remote object store; HBM when inserted into prompt
eviction_failure_mode: stale evidence, repeated retrieval, or lost citation provenance

example: shell output, browser page, database result, test log, solver result

lifetime_start: tool call returns or stream begins
lifetime_end: artifact archived, superseded, or task completes
reuse_mode: reused for verification, reporting, replay, and future prompts
reuse_distance_driver: tool-call graph, audit needs, and recomputation cost
placement_candidates: CPU DRAM; NVMe; durable workspace; remote store; semantic cache
compression_candidates: structured extraction; truncation with pointer; compression
eviction_failure_mode: lost reproducibility, expensive rerun, or missing evidence

example: parser buffers, planner notes, compiler temp files, generated candidates

reuse_distance_driver: pipeline stage duration and retry probability
placement_candidates: HBM/GPU memory; CPU DRAM; local disk temp
eviction_failure_mode: memory spike, failed tool step, or rerun

example: speculative plan, candidate answer, candidate patch, branch-local KV

lifetime_end: branch is merged, abandoned, or promoted
reuse_mode: uncertain future reuse if branch survives or informs merge
reuse_distance_driver: branch probability, verifier delay, and merge probability
placement_candidates: HBM/GPU memory for hot KV; CPU DRAM; NVMe checkpoint; durable workspace
eviction_failure_mode: lost alternative, duplicate exploration, or biased merge

example: test results, proofs, counterexamples, audit checklist

lifetime_end: candidate accepted/rejected and audit state archived
reuse_mode: reused across retries, regressions, and final audit
reuse_distance_driver: failure rate, validation loop count, and candidate similarity
placement_candidates: CPU DRAM; NVMe; durable workspace; HBM when verifier prompt uses it
eviction_failure_mode: false confidence, missed counterexample, or repeated validation

example: ordered actions, observations, decisions, prompts, and outputs

lifetime_end: retention policy expires or run archived
reuse_mode: audit, replay, summarization, and context reconstruction
reuse_distance_driver: run length, audit depth, and summarization cadence
placement_candidates: CPU DRAM hot index; NVMe; durable workspace; remote log store
compression_candidates: summaries with raw pointers; event compaction; indexing
eviction_failure_mode: lost auditability, broken resume, or unreproducible result

example: files, patches, datasets, plots, checkpoints, reports
